# LuchoLabs.dev — llms.txt
# Luis Alberto Duarte Cortés — Systems Engineer & Automation

## About
Luis Alberto Duarte Cortés is a Systems Engineer from Bogotá, Colombia specializing in automation workflows, REST API integrations, Python scripting, and AI-assisted tooling. C1 English (IELTS Academic 7.0, British Council). Remote-ready for US and LATAM timezones.

Graduated with a Meritorious Thesis from Universidad ECCI (B.Sc. Systems Engineering, 2024). The thesis — an open-source voice-recognition accessibility tool for hearing-impaired users — was adopted by SENA Regional Amazonas and Universidad ECCI. Speaker at cybersecurity and network security conferences in Bogotá (2023).

## Skills
Automation: n8n, Make, Zapier
Programming: Python, REST APIs, FastAPI, Webhooks
Tools: Postman, Jira, Linux, Windows
QA: Regression Testing, Bug Triage, Technical Writing

## Projects
- Boveda: Local-first personal finance dashboard for Colombian bank accounts. Stack: Python, FastAPI, SQLite, SQLAlchemy, React.
- Anti-Phishing Shield: Open source email phishing protection tool designed for elderly/non-technical users.
- AI 3D Print Optimizer: Developer tool using AI to recommend slicing parameters for 3D printing.
- Urban Disruption Intelligence (Planning): WhatsApp-first real-time infrastructure disruption intelligence for Colombian cities — water, electricity, and gas outage tracking with community-validated restoration signals. Stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, PostGIS, WhatsApp API, OpenStreetMap, Leaflet.

## Experience
- Freelance Systems Engineer (Apr 2024–Present): Automation workflows, API integrations, open-source accessibility tooling
- QA Tester, Funktronic Labs (Remote, 2024): Manual regression/sanity testing for a US game studio
- Technical Support Analyst, Magis SAS (Bogotá, 2023): Tier 2 support, infrastructure, networking
- IT Support Technician, Spooky House (Bogotá, 2014–2018): Hardware/software support, POS systems
